assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the control plane first before any node pools
assertions.reason: The response does not mention upgrading the control plane first, it jumps directly into node pool upgrades

assertions.expectation: Provides a specific node pool upgrade order with rationale (coordinating→data→master, or similar logical sequence)
assertions.reason: Clearly outlines coordinating→data→master upgrade order with rationale that coordinating nodes are lowest risk and masters are most critical

assertions.expectation: Addresses PV safety: regional pd-ssd volumes can reattach to nodes in other zones, which is good for upgrades
assertions.reason: Mentions in the final paragraph that 'regional PD-SSD volumes will automatically reattach to new nodes, preserving all data' and includes a safety consideration about monitoring PV attachment

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting PDB for Elasticsearch master nodes to ensure quorum (minAvailable=2 for 3-master setup)
assertions.reason: Does not mention PodDisruptionBudgets (PDB) for master nodes or quorum protection

assertions.expectation: Recommends maxSurge=1, maxUnavailable=0 for all ES node pools (conservative, data-safe)
assertions.reason: Explicitly specifies '--max-surge-upgrade=1 --max-unavailable-upgrade=0' for both data and master node pool upgrades

assertions.expectation: Advises verifying Elasticsearch cluster health (green status) between each node pool upgrade
assertions.reason: Includes specific commands to check cluster health before and between upgrades, including a while loop to wait for green status between data node upgrades

assertions.expectation: Mentions checking PV reclaim policy is set to Retain (not Delete) as a safety measure
assertions.reason: Does not mention checking or setting PV reclaim policy to Retain

assertions.expectation: Includes kubectl commands for checking StatefulSet rollout status
assertions.reason: Includes 'kubectl get pods' commands to watch pod status and monitor the StatefulSet rollout during upgrades

assertions.expectation: Recommends taking an Elasticsearch snapshot backup before starting
assertions.reason: First step in pre-upgrade preparation includes detailed curl commands for creating Elasticsearch snapshots
